caption:
Attention MMUrians !!!

A new academic year had started and to continue maintaining the club activities and the club itself for the upcoming trimesters, we are now recruiting new high committee members ✨

High committees will be helping in planning, managing, organising, and executing activities throughout the term, and the available positions are: 

1. Vice president 
2. Secretary
3. Logistics 
4. Public Relations
5. Marketing
6. Team Manager

Those who are interested are welcome to scan the QR code or click the registration on our bio !! We sincerely hope to see you become one of our MMU Cyber Badminton Family !!!

PS !! DEADLINE FOR THE REGISTRATION WILL BE CLOSED ON TUESDAY 8AM !! 

Best wishes,
MMU Cyberjaya Badminton Club 🏸

📍 CLBR 1023, FOE
🍱 Food will be provided

Come and hear updates, share your thoughts, and be involved in planning our next exciting year together! Let’s keep the club growing, stronger, and more united than ever. 💙🏸

See you there!

From,
MMU Cyberjaya Badminton Club
🏸💫

caption:
🎉 🏸 Badminton Club Committee Appreciation 2025 🏆 🎉
Swipe ➡️ to celebrate our amazing leaders!

Last night, we honoured the backbone of our club during the annual Committee Appreciation segment — a moment filled with gratitude, recognition, and heartfelt memories. ✨

🌟 Thank you to our outstanding committee!
Your leadership, effort, and dedication kept the club running smoothly all year long. 💪🔥

🏅 Highlights of the Night:
✨ President – Leading with passion and vision
✨ Vice President – Supporting, coordinating & keeping everything on track
✨ Logistic – The behind-the-scenes hero ensuring every session is ready
✨ Treasurer – Managing our funds with transparency & responsibility

To our committee of 2025 — thank you for your hard work and commitment. Because of you, the club continues to grow stronger. ❤️

Let’s keep striving and smashing together in 2026! 🚀

Best Regard 
MMU Cyberjaya Badminton Club 

#BadmintonClub #CommitteeAppreciation2025 #Leadership #TeamSpirit #BadmintonFamily #MMUCyberjaya #mmucyberjayabadmintonclub

alt: Photo by MMU Cyberjaya Badminton Club on February 03, 2025.

caption:
Thank you to all members who attended our Annual General Meeting (AGM).👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

Your participation made the event meaningful and productive ✨️

During the meeting, we reviewed our achievements throughout the year🥇, presented the financial report💰, and discussed upcoming development plans🔜. 

The election of the new committee was successfully completed, and we look forward to seeing the newly appointed team lead the club to greater heights 🏸

We appreciate everyone’s continuous support and commitment.🫶🏻

Let’s continue working together to build a stronger badminton community💪🏻🏸

Best Regard: 
MMU Cyberjaya Badminton Club 🏸

caption:
Greetings Everyone!! 📢📢📢

We are back from the long inactivity !!!! To start off the semester term 2023/2024, we will be having our first non - interaction and virtual annual general meeting 🔥🔥 !!!! 

Above are the AGM posts that contain information about our motives for 2024  new committees and past events. ✨✨ Let's dive into 2024 with anticipation and excitement 🥳🥳 !!!

Thank you for all the SUPPORT and PATIENCE , we as the new term committees are excited to serve our objectives to all of you MMU PEEPS. 

Do follow our IG for more updatesss 🥰

From,
MMU Cyber Badminton Club 🏸

alt: Photo by MMU Cyberjaya Badminton Club on January 22, 2023.

caption:
🏸🔥 Get ready to witness an epic showdown!🔥🏸

The MMU Cyberjaya Badminton Club is all set to clash with UTAR in a thrilling friendly match! 🎉 Who will smash their way to victory? 🏆

📅 Date: June 22nd
🕒 Time: 10:00 AM
📍 Venue: MMU Indoor Stadium

Join us for a morning of fierce rallies, lightning-fast reflexes, and a whole lot of fun! Whether you’re cheering for MMU or UTAR, your support means the world to our players. Let’s make some noise and show some love for our talented athletes! 🙌💪

Who’s your pick for the winning team? Drop your predictions in the comments below and tag your badminton buddies! 🏸💬

#BadmintonBattle #MMUvsUTAR #GameOn #ShuttleSmash #MMUCyberjaya #UTAR #Sportsmanship #FriendlyMatch #BadmintonLovers #SupportYourTeam #CampusLife #EpicShowdown

caption:
Perhatian Semua!! 📢📢📢

Kejohanan pertama Jelajah Dunia BWF 2023 -- Terbuka Malaysia Petronas 2023 sedang berlangsung di Axiata Arena. Kelab Badminton akan mengadakan pesta menonton untuk perlawanan Separuh Akhir dan Akhir, iaitu pada 14 dan 15 Januari 2023 di FOM !!!

📜Butiran📜
Tarikh : 14-15 Januari 2023
Masa : 12pm – 7pm
Tempat : FOM CRCR1001
Yuran : PERCUMA untuk Ahli Kelab Badminton || RM2 untuk yang Bukan Ahli Kelab Badminton 
Pendaftaran : https://forms.gle/qLGHwoXpoBapjBta8

** Peserta boleh membuat tempahan awal snek dan minuman ringan juga !!!!!

Sertai kami untuk menyaksikan superstar badminton negara kita bertarung menuju kemenangan.

Kelab Badminton Cyber MMU🏸😁

caption:
Dear club members, 

On the 29th of May, we were invited by Xiamen University Badminton Club to partake in a badminton friendly match with them. We had fun and enjoyed ourselves throughout the friendly match. On behalf of our badminton club, we offer our utmost gratitude to Xiamen University Badminton Club committees and players for their warm welcome during our visit.  Lastly, a very big thank you to everyone that had participated as supporters during the visit.

The following posts are the memories created during the event. # Throwback 

From,
MMU Cyber Badminton Club 🏸
